goal: Add Meow Coin currency (earn + balance chip) + achievement rewards + a Shop to spend coins on decks

Wired earns: +5 daily-login (common.js initShell, once/day), +5 daily-reading + +20 per newly-unlocked achievement + +20 per newly-unlocked deck (progress.js trackCompletedDailyReading). Top-right balance chip (renderMeowCoinChip, app-shell pages, live-updates, links to shop). New Shop page (shop.html + th/shop.html + js/shop.js): balance pill + deck grid (buy=100 coins, spend->owned in localStorage) + honest 'coming soon' state while SHOP_DECKS is empty. CSS in styles.css. EN/TH parity verified.

playwright TH: ร้านค้าเหรียญเหมียว + สำรับใหม่กำลังจะมา, no errors
